title: handroanthus durus
intro: Handroanthus durus, also known as the Brazilian Cherry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, native to Brazil. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Handroanthus durus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Handroanthus durus is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its bark and leaves can be used to make herbal remedies, such as extracts and tinctures.
